content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

January 15, 1992

Frank J. Dursa  
2533 Harmony Hill Drive  
Diamond Bar, CA 91765

Re: Your Request for Assistance  
Our File No. G-92-032

Dear Mr. Dursa:

This is in response to your letter requesting assistance concerning the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act. Pursuant to your request we are enclosing a copy of the Arczynski Advice Letter, No. A-90-475. We have also enclosed complaint forms for your convenience.

The Commission does not provide advice in response to questions regarding the duties of third parties under the Act. (Regulation 18329(b)(8).) Where questions of another person's past conduct are involved, the question may be appropriate for a complaint.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:JWW:aa  
Enclosure
